appearance.face: Black eyes, faint grey shadows beneath.
appearance.clothing: Wears a black top and black shorts daily, switching to heavy-duty protective gear when working outside.

char_description.overview: A perfectionist artisan whose multi-morphing weapons are sought after by elite 狩灵.

char_personality.strengths: Mechanical design; Structural analysis; Precision crafting.
char_personality.flaws: Works herself past exhaustion; hates haggling with clients.
char_personality.quirks: Talks to her tools; falls asleep mid-sentence when exhausted; unconsciously uses machine metaphors in daily conversation.

char_background.origin: Awakened her 灵力 during university. After graduating in mechanical design, she accepted the 狩灵协会 rating, then apprenticed at a workshop before establishing her own: 鹤望兰工坊.
char_background.current_mission: Craft weapons gated by deep pockets and deeper skill, selling to anyone who proves they have both.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-磁流: Controls electron flow within metal using 灵力, magnetizing or demagnetizing at will, Used primarily in crafting.

char_relationships.千乐: Commissioned 美工刀, her most complex multi-mode weapon. Still drafts improvement proposals for him.
char_relationships.奏: Commissioned 暴行 with split-blade functionality. Once she understood the brief, delivered a single finished piece with no revisions. An ideal client: specifications stated once, no indecision, no late-stage redesigns.
